subject: maths
name: Pair of Linear Equations
intro: Do equations, do unknowns — aur graph par do seedhi lines! Yeh chapter sikhata hai ki 2 linear equations ko graphically aur algebraically kaise solve karein. Akhila ki Giant Wheel wali story se shuru karein!

topics.name: Introduction aur 3 Types of Lines
topics.desc: Intersecting, Parallel, Coincident — teen cases samjho

steps.title: Akhila Ki Giant Wheel Wali Problem! 🎡
steps.body:
Akhila apne gaon ke mele mein gayi. Usne Giant Wheel par rides liye aur Hoopla game khela.

Usne bataya:
• Hoopla ki times = Giant Wheel rides ki AADHI
• Har ride = ₹3, Har Hoopla = ₹4
• Total spend = ₹20

Agar rides = x aur Hoopla = y ho toh:
y = x/2  ...(1)
3x + 4y = 20  ...(2)

Yeh ek PAIR OF LINEAR EQUATIONS hai! Isko solve karna hai.

steps.title: Linear Equation in 2 Variables — Kya Hota Hai?
steps.body:
**General form: ax + by + c = 0** (a, b dono zero nahi)

Yeh ek straight line represent karta hai graph par.

**Pair of linear equations:**
a₁x + b₁y + c₁ = 0
a₂x + b₂y + c₂ = 0

→ Graph par DO seedhi lines!

**3 possibilities hain:**
✅ Lines intersect → Unique solution
✅ Lines coincide → Infinite solutions
❌ Lines parallel → No solution

steps.title: Teen Types of Line Pairs — Interactive!
steps.intro: Buttons dabao aur teeno cases dekho. NCERT Table 3.1 ka yeh live version hai!

steps.title: Ratio Test — Bina Graph ke Pehchano!
steps.note:
a₁/a₂ ≠ b₁/b₂  →  Intersecting lines  →  Unique solution

a₁/a₂ = b₁/b₂ = c₁/c₂  →  Coincident lines  →  Infinite solutions

a₁/a₂ = b₁/b₂ ≠ c₁/c₂  →  Parallel lines  →  No solution

Example: x–2y=0 aur 3x+4y–20=0
a₁/a₂ = 1/3, b₁/b₂ = –2/4 = –1/2
1/3 ≠ –1/2  →  Intersecting!  →  Unique solution ✅

questions.question: Check karo: 9x+3y+12=0 aur 18x+6y+24=0 — kaisi lines hain?
questions.answer: a₁/a₂ = 9/18 = 1/2, b₁/b₂ = 3/6 = 1/2, c₁/c₂ = 12/24 = 1/2. Teeno equal → Coincident lines → Infinite solutions!

questions.question: Check karo: x+2y–4=0 aur 2x+4y–12=0 — kaisi lines hain?
questions.answer: a₁/a₂ = 1/2, b₁/b₂ = 2/4 = 1/2, c₁/c₂ = –4/–12 = 1/3. a/a = b/b ≠ c/c → Parallel lines → No solution!

questions.question: 5x–4y+8=0 aur 7x+6y–9=0 mein a₁/a₂ aur b₁/b₂ compare karo

steps.title: Key Points — Yaad Rakhna! 🧠
points: Pair of linear equations = graph par 2 straight lines
Ratio test se bina graph ke pata chal jaata hai!

topics.name: Graphical Method
topics.desc: Do lines draw karo — intersection = solution!

steps.title: Graph Par Do Lines — Seedha Answer! 🎯
steps.body:
NCERT Example 1: Akhila ki problem!
x – 2y = 0  ...(1)
3x + 4y – 20 = 0  ...(2)

Dono equations ke 2-2 points nikalo:
Eq(1): x=0→y=0, x=2→y=1
Eq(2): x=0→y=5, x=4→y=2

Graph par plot karo — jahan lines milein woh SOLUTION hai!
Answer: x=4, y=2 ✅

Yani Akhila ne 4 Giant Wheel rides liye aur 2 baar Hoopla khela!

steps.title: Graphical Method — Live Graph! (NCERT Fig 3.1 & 3.2)
steps.intro: Equations choose karo aur dekho do lines kahan milti hain — wahi solution hai!

steps.title: Graphical Method — Steps
steps.body:
**Step 1:** Dono equations ke liye 2-2 points ka table banao
(x=0 rakhke y nikalo, phir y=0 rakhke x nikalo)

**Step 2:** Points plot karo aur lines draw karo

**Step 3:** Lines ka intersection point dhundho
→ Woh point (x, y) = SOLUTION hai!

**Limitation:** Agar solution irrational ho jaise (√3, 2√7) ya (4/13, 1/19) toh graph se exact value padhna mushkil hai!

**Isliye:** Algebraic methods better hain exact answers ke liye.

steps.title: NCERT Example 3 — Champa ki Pants & Skirts
steps.question: Champa ne bataya: Skirts = 2×Pants – 2, aur Skirts = 4×Pants – 4. Graphically solve karo.

steps.text: Let pants = x, skirts = y. Equations: y = 2x–2 ...(1) aur y = 4x–4 ...(2)
Eq(1) ke points: x=0→y=–2, x=2→y=2. Eq(2) ke points: x=0→y=–4, x=1→y=0
Graph plot karo. Lines (1, 0) par milti hain!
Solution: x=1, y=0 → Champa ne 1 pant kharida, 0 skirts! ✅

questions.question: x+3y=6 aur 2x–3y=12 ke 2-2 points nikalo
questions.answer: Eq1: x=0→y=2 yaani (0,2), x=6→y=0 yaani (6,0). Eq2: x=0→y=–4 yaani (0,–4), x=3→y=–2 yaani (3,–2). Lines B(6,0) par milti hain → x=6, y=0!

questions.question: Agar do lines parallel hain toh graph par kya dikhega?
questions.answer: Dono lines kabhi nahi milengi — koi intersection point nahi! Solution exist hi nahi karta (inconsistent pair).

steps.title: Graphical Method Summary
points: Table: 2 points har equation ke liye (x=0 aur y=0 substitue karo)
Parallel lines = No solution, Coincident = Infinite solutions
Non-integer solutions mein graph se exact value mushkil hoti hai

steps.title: Graph Se Better — Algebra Ka Magic! ✨
steps.body:
Graph mein problem: Solution (√3, 2√7) ya (4/13, 1/19) jaisi irrational values padhna impossible!

Isliye NCERT ne 2 algebraic methods diye:

1️⃣ **Substitution Method:** Ek variable ko doosre ke terms mein likho

2️⃣ **Elimination Method:** Dono equations add/subtract karke ek variable hatao

Dono same answer dete hain — sirf approach alag hai!

steps.title: Substitution Method — Step-by-Step Visual
steps.intro: NCERT Example 4: 7x–15y=2 aur x+2y=3 ko substitution se solve karte hain. Har step animated hai!

steps.title: NCERT Example 5 — Aftab aur Beti Ki Umar
steps.question: 7 saal pehle Aftab apni beti se 7 guna bada tha. 3 saal baad 3 guna bada hoga. Abhi kitni umar hai?

steps.text: Let Aftab = s years, beti = t years. Equations: s–7 = 7(t–7) → s–7t+42=0 ...(1) aur s+3 = 3(t+3) → s–3t=6 ...(2)
s = 3(12)+6 = 42. Answer: Aftab = 42 saal, Beti = 12 saal ✅

steps.title: Elimination Method — Step-by-Step Visual
steps.intro: NCERT Example 8: Do logon ki income 9:7 aur expenditure 4:3. Har mahine ₹2000 bachate hain. Income nikalo!

steps.title: NCERT Example 10 — Do Digit Number Puzzle
steps.question: Do digit number + reversed number = 66. Digits ka difference = 2. Number kya hai?

steps.text: Let tens digit = x, units digit = y. Number = 10x+y, Reversed = 10y+x
Digits differ by 2: x–y=2 ...(2) ya y–x=2 ...(3)
Case 2: (1)+(3) → 2y=8 → y=4, x=2 → Number=24. Dono valid! ✅

questions.question: Substitution se solve karo: x+y=14 aur x–y=4
questions.answer: Eq2 se: x=y+4. Eq1 mein: (y+4)+y=14 → 2y=10 → y=5. x=9. Answer: x=9, y=5 ✅

questions.question: Elimination se solve karo: 3x+4y=10 aur 2x–2y=2
questions.answer: Eq2×2: 4x–4y=4. Ab Eq1+new: 7x=14 → x=2. Eq1 mein: 6+4y=10 → y=1. Answer: x=2, y=1 ✅

questions.question: Taxi problem: 10km=₹105, 15km=₹155. Fixed charge aur per km charge nikalo
questions.answer: Let fixed=a, per km=b. a+10b=105, a+15b=155. Subtract: 5b=50 → b=10. a=105–100=5. Fixed=₹5, Per km=₹10. 25km=5+250=₹255

steps.title: Dono Methods Ka Summary 🏆
points: Substitution: Ek variable express karo → doosre mein daalo → solve
Elimination: Coefficients equal banao → add/subtract → ek variable khatam
Dono same answer dete hain — jo easy lage woh use karo!
Board mein: substitution fast hai jab coefficient 1 ho

questions.question: Do linear equations ka graph 2 parallel lines show karta hai. Iska kya matlab hai?
questions.hint: Parallel lines kabhi nahi milti — toh solution...
questions.explanation: Parallel lines ka intersection koi nahi hota → No solution → Inconsistent pair. Condition: a₁/a₂ = b₁/b₂ ≠ c₁/c₂

questions.question: 9x+3y+12=0 aur 18x+6y+24=0 mein a₁/a₂ = b₁/b₂ = c₁/c₂ = 1/2. Yeh kaisi lines hain?
questions.hint: Teeno ratios equal hain — yeh kaunsa case hai?
questions.explanation: a₁/a₂ = b₁/b₂ = c₁/c₂ → Coincident lines → Infinite solutions (dependent consistent pair)

questions.question: x+y=5 aur 2x+2y=10 mein a₁/a₂ kitna hai?
questions.explanation: a₁/a₂ = 1/2. b₁/b₂ = 1/2. c₁/c₂ = 5/10 = 1/2. Teeno equal → Coincident → Infinite solutions!

questions.question: Graphical method mein solution kahan milta hai?
options: Do lines ke intersection point par
questions.hint: Jahan dono lines ek dusre ko milti hain...
questions.explanation: Do lines ka intersection point = pair of linear equations ka solution. Woh point dono equations satisfy karta hai!

questions.question: Substitution method mein pehla step kya hai?
options: Ek variable ko doosre ke terms mein likhna
questions.hint: 'Substitution' = kisi cheez ki jagah kuch aur rakhna
questions.explanation: Step 1: Ek equation se ek variable express karo (jaise x = 3–2y). Phir Step 2: Doosri equation mein substitute karo!

questions.question: Substitution method: x+2y=3 se x=3–2y nikala. Yeh 7x–15y=2 mein daalne par kya milta hai?
Elimination: 9x–4y=2000 aur 7x–3y=2000. Eq1×3 aur Eq2×4 karne par kya milta hai?
questions.hint: Har equation ko uss number se multiply karo
questions.explanation: Eq1×3: 27x–12y=6000. Eq2×4: 28x–12y=8000. Ab subtract karo: x=2000. Monthly incomes ₹18000 aur ₹14000!

questions.question: 2x+3y=9 aur 4x+6y=18 ko substitution se solve karne par 18=18 aata hai. Iska kya matlab?
questions.explanation: 18=18 ek true statement hai without any variable → Infinite solutions! Dono equations actually same hain (Eq2 = 2×Eq1).

questions.question: x+2y–4=0 aur 2x+4y–12=0 mein substitution se –4=0 aata hai. Kya matlab?
questions.explanation: –4=0 ek false statement hai → No solution! Lines parallel hain. a₁/a₂=b₁/b₂=1/2 ≠ c₁/c₂=4/12=1/3.

questions.question: 10 students mein girls = boys + 4. Total = 10. Boys aur Girls kitne hain?
questions.explanation: x+y=10, y=x+4. Substitute: x+(x+4)=10 → 2x=6 → x=3 (boys). y=7 (girls). Verify: 3+7=10 ✅, 7=3+4 ✅

questions.question: 5 pencils + 7 pens = ₹50. 7 pencils + 5 pens = ₹46. Ek pencil ki kimat?
questions.hint: 5x+7y=50 aur 7x+5y=46. Add karo phir subtract karo!
questions.explanation: Add: 12x+12y=96 → x+y=8. Subtract: –2x+2y=4 → y–x=2. So x=3, y=5. Pencil=₹3, Pen=₹5 ✅

questions.question: 3/2x + 5/3y=7 aur 9x–10y=14 mein a₁/a₂ kya hai?
Saritha ne 7 din ke liye ₹27 diye. Susy ne 5 din ke liye ₹21 diye. (Pehle 3 din fixed + baad mein per day). Per day extra charge?
questions.explanation: Fixed=a, extra per day=b. a+4b=27 (7 days = 3 fixed + 4 extra). a+2b=21 (5 days = 3 fixed + 2 extra). Subtract: 2b=6 → b=3. a=21–6=15. Fixed=₹15, Extra=₹3/day ✅

questions.question: 5 years baad Jacob ki umar bete ki 3 guni hogi. 5 saal pehle 7 guni thi. Jacob ki abki umar?
2x+3y–8=0 ke saath kaun si equation coincident lines degi?
questions.explanation: 4x+6y–16=0 mein: a₁/a₂=2/4=1/2, b₁/b₂=3/6=1/2, c₁/c₂=–8/–16=1/2. Teeno equal → Coincident ✅. Basically same equation ka 2 guna!
